cat /etc/init.d/cron:
#!/bin/sh
### BEGIN INIT INFO
# Provides:          cron
# Required-Start:    $local_fs $remote_fs
# Required-Stop:     $local_fs $remote_fs
# Default-Start:     2 3 4 5
# Default-Stop:      0 1 6
# Short-Description: Cron Daemon
# Description:       This file starts and stops the cron daemon.
### END INIT INFO

# Exit if the package is not installed
[ -x /usr/sbin/cron ] || exit 0

# Load the function library
. /lib/lsb/init-functions

case "$1" in
  start)
    log_daemon_msg "Starting cron" "cron"
    start-stop-daemon --start --quiet --exec /usr/sbin/cron
    log_end_msg $?
    ;;
  stop)
    log_daemon_msg "Stopping cron" "cron"
    start-stop-daemon --stop --quiet --name cron
    log_end_msg $?
    ;;
  restart|force-reload)
    $0 stop
    $0 start
    ;;
  status)
    status_of_proc -p /var/run/cron.pid cron "cron" && exit 0 || exit $?
    ;;
  *)
    echo "Usage: $0 {start|stop|restart|force-reload|status}" >&2
    exit 1
    ;;
esac

exit 0
